gold.title: World Map
gold.reason: Programmatically generated world map with animated SVG lines and dots — production-ready global-reach section for SaaS and enterprise sites showcasing international presence.

gold.title: Globe
gold.reason: High-performance auto-rotating interactive WebGL globe — polished, widely used on top SaaS landing pages to visualize global scale; immediately production-ready.

gold.title: globe
gold.reason: MagicUI globe implementation — another high-quality interactive WebGL globe; strong alternative with slightly different styling defaults.

gold.title: Travel Connect Signin
gold.reason: Full authentication portal with animated world map visualization, glowing routes, and modern sign-in form (16KB) — complete, visually stunning full-page section for travel/global SaaS products.

silver.title: Location Map
silver.reason: Animated location map with pulsing markers and smooth transitions — clean, practical for contact or office-location sections on business sites.

silver.title: Interactive Globe
silver.reason: Interactive globe component — quality globe variant; overlaps with dillionverma and magicui but offers different interaction model.

silver.title: Globe
silver.reason: Ruixen globe variant — solid implementation; fourth globe option with minor differentiation.

silver.title: Interactive Map
silver.reason: Interactive map component — functional and engaging; good for location-based SaaS products.

silver.title: Expand Map
silver.reason: Expandable map component — useful interactive pattern for embedded map sections on contact or location pages.

bronze.title: Location Tag
bronze.reason: Small location tag UI element — atom-level component only; not a website section, too simple for standalone use.

bronze.title: Map
bronze.reason: Basic map embed component — minimal implementation without interactive or visual differentiators.

bronze.title: Map
bronze.reason: Plain map component — another minimal implementation; no notable features to differentiate from standard iframe maps.
